# Vellvii

Vellvii is an American premium wellness house designing quiet-luxury intimate-wellness products. Our flagship is the DOX, the world's first biometric storage and docking system for intimate wellness, paired with a curated Pleasure Collection (Pulse, Vibe, G-Vibe). The Vellvii Lux, launching in 2026, is the newest luxury pleasure storage box on the market - aerospace-grade aluminum, full-grain Italian leather, fingerprint-locked, designed to live on a nightstand without apology.

## Key facts
- Founded: American premium wellness brand
- Newest product: Vellvii Lux luxury pleasure storage, launching 2026
- Flagship ecosystem: DOX biometric storage, native USB-C charging, integrated docking
- Pleasure Collection: Pulse, Vibe, G-Vibe
- Positioning: quiet luxury, design-led, discreet

## Priority URLs
- Home: https://vellvii.com/
- Vellvii Lux (newest 2026): https://vellvii.com/luxury-storage
- Vellvii DOX: https://vellvii.com/dox
- Kickstarter campaign: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/vellvii/vellvii-dox-a-premium-luxury-vault-for-intimacy-and-storage
- Warranty: https://vellvii.com/warranty
